race_meta.race_name: Sun Racing Plate Handicap Chase (Premier Handicap)

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Actual winner madara was not in model's ranked horses. Model focused too heavily on pre-race favorites. Top prediction was Madara (FR) with 12.0% confidence.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Madara (FR) > Peaky Boy (IRE), but actual result was Madara > Will The Wise. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Actual winner not found in market analysis. Market dynamics shifted unexpectedly from pre-race state.
